meta.title: EXCLUSIVE! F-22 Raptors fired on Alaska UFO with 20mm Cannons?!
meta.description:
We recently received an incredible care package from our friend Derek with the 90th AMU Dicemen out of Joint Base Elmendorf–Richardson in Alaska. The package included some incredible swag... and an even more incredible story! 

Huge thanks to the 90th AMU and all of the Airmen stationed at JBER!

Citations: 
- https://www.defense.gov/News/News-Stories/Article/Article/3295813/air-force-shoots-down-high-altitude-object-off-alaskan-coast/
- https://apnews.com/article/politics-united-states-government-south-carolina-3a6f05a2b3158d104b4921860849495f
- https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-rundown-on-all-3-ufo-intercepts-this-week/
- https://www.businessinsider.com/objects-shot-down-over-alaska-canada-ufo-interfered-f22-sensors-2023-2
- https://www.yahoo.com/news/why-u-used-missiles-not-125447249.html
- https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/chinese-spy-balloon-answering-all-your-questions-and-dispelling-the-myths/
- https://twitter.com/USNorthernCmd/status/1626783632500178945/photo/1
